language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings

welcome.title: Welcome to TruckerNet
welcome.slogan: Know exactly what every load pays — and run your truck like the business it is.
welcome.changeHint: You can change this anytime in Settings

s1.headline: Here's how TruckerNet thinks
s1.sub: Tell us your costs once. We turn every load into a real number — and tell you if it's worth it.
s1.step1: You tell us your costs once
s1.punchline: Stop guessing what a load really pays.

s2.headline: Should you take this load?
s2.sub: Enter the rate and miles. Get a true net-pay verdict before you accept — unlimited, always free.
s2.punchline: Know it's worth it before you commit.

s3.headline: Know if you're being lowballed
s3.sub: We compare your offer against what other drivers are actually getting paid to haul this lane — so you know a cheap rate the moment you see it.
s3.lowball: This rate is below what this lane pays
s3.punchline: Never leave money on the table again.

s4.headline: IFTA files itself
s4.sub: We track every mile and every gallon of diesel you burn in each state automatically — ready to export and send to your accountant in one tap.

freeUsage.limitReached: Monthly limit reached — upgrade for unlimited
freeUsage.valueMissed: Pro would have flagged {{count}} lowball load{{count, plural, one{} other{s}}} — ~{{amount}} left on the table this month

profile.heading: Almost there
profile.subheading: Tell us a bit about your operation so TruckerNet can personalize your experience.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start tracking your real net pay today.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to
auth.clickToActivate: Click the link to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.errorEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.guestMode: Explore the app without an account →
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.appleFailed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.

fuel.title: What's your weekly fuel spend?
fuel.subtitle: Your best guess is fine — you can update this anytime.
fuel.label: WEEKLY FUEL COST
fuel.hint: Think about your last few fill-ups

expenses.title: What are your monthly expenses?
expenses.subtitle: Fill in the ones that apply, then add anything else. The more accurate, the better your break-even rate.
expenses.fixedHint: Fill in the ones that apply to you. Leave the rest blank.
expenses.otherHint: Permits, tolls, subscriptions — anything else you pay for.
expenses.emptyHint: Tap "+ Add Expense" to get started
expenses.insuranceRequired: Enter your insurance cost — your break-even rate can't be real without it.
expenses.truckRequired: Enter your truck payment — or 0 if you own your truck outright.

miles.title: How many miles per week?
miles.subtitle: We'll calculate your monthly miles from this.
miles.label: WEEKLY MILES
miles.sanityHigh: With ${{costs}}/mo in costs over {{miles}} miles/mo, you'd need ${{be}}/mi just to break even — far above real-world rates. Double-check your weekly miles, fuel, and expenses.
miles.sanityLow: Your break-even comes out to ${{be}}/mi — far below what running a truck really costs. Double-check your fuel and expense entries.

result.title: Your break-even rate
result.subtitle: Accept loads that pay MORE than this to make a profit.
result.nudge: Add your expenses and miles to calculate your break-even rate. You can do this anytime in the app.

goals.title: Set your target
goals.subtitle: Your income goal keeps you on track, and your tax rate tells you what to set aside. Both optional — change them anytime.
goals.goalHint: Your take-home target after all costs. We’ll track your progress on the dashboard.
goals.taxHint: Most owner-operators set aside 25–30% for taxes. You can fine-tune this anytime.

onboarding.reviewSubtitle: Your current numbers are loaded — adjust anything that's changed, then continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.breakEvenSetup: Set up your costs to get your break-even
dashboard.checkLoad: Check Load — Is This Worth It?
dashboard.noLoadsHint: Tap + to log your first load and see your real net pay.
dashboard.breakEvenUnit: per mile — below this you lose money
dashboard.goalFresh: Fresh start — log a load to get rolling
dashboard.weekEmpty: Log your first load this week to see your numbers.

checkLoad.title: Check Load
checkLoad.subtitle: Find out if this load is worth taking.
checkLoad.noBreakEven: Add your expenses and miles in setup to get an accurate break-even verdict.

fuel.title: Fuel
fuel.noEntriesHint: Every fill-up updates your real cost-per-mile.

form.title: Log Fuel Entry
form.odometerHint: Last recorded: {{miles}} mi — {{driven}} miles since last fill-up
form.odometerFirst: First entry — odometer will be tracked from here
form.saveError: Could not save fuel entry. Please try again.
form.missingInfo: Please enter amount spent, gallons, and your current odometer reading.
form.checkAmount: A single fill-up over $2,000 seems unlikely. Please double-check the amount.
form.checkGallons: Over 500 gallons seems unlikely. Please double-check.
form.checkOdometerHigh: Odometer reading over 2,000,000 miles seems unlikely. Please double-check.
form.checkOdometerLow: Your last recorded reading was {{miles}} mi. New reading must be higher.

scan.chooseMessage: Take a photo or choose one from your library
scan.scannedHint: Scanned — double-check the values below before saving.
scan.permissionMsg: Allow camera and photo access to scan receipts.
scan.notAvailableMsg: Receipt scanning isn't available yet. Enter the values manually.
scan.failedMsg: We couldn't read that receipt. Try a clearer photo or enter the values manually.

fuel.heroAvg: Avg of your last {{count}} fill-ups · Updated {{date}}
fuel.heroBaseline: First fill-up sets your odometer baseline — log your next fill-up to see your cost per mile
fuel.heroEmpty: Log a fill-up to see your real cost per mile
fuel.heroEstimate: Estimated from your setup — updates with your first fill-up
fuel.estimateNote: ≈ {{cost}}/week ÷ {{miles}} mi. This powers your break-even now; log a real fill-up and it switches to your actual cost.
fuel.estimateHint: Your setup estimate is running the numbers for now. Log your first fill-up to track your real cost per mile.
fuel.valueCpm: Your true fuel cost per mile
fuel.valueCpmSub: The number that decides whether a load pays
fuel.valueIftaSub: Every fill-up feeds your quarterly report automatically

addLoad.title: Add Load
addLoad.stateMileageLockBody: Upgrade to Pro to see and edit your per-state mileage — auto-built for IFTA filing.
addLoad.deadheadHint: Unpaid reposition leg — logs the miles for IFTA

fuelStop.title: WHERE TO FUEL
fuelStop.savings: vs. the cheaper-looking pump in {{naive}}: save ~{{amount}} on a fill
fuelStop.disclaimer: IFTA credits pump tax against miles driven, so price minus tax is what a gallon really costs you. State averages as of {{asOf}} — not station prices. Estimates only.

brokerCheck.notFound: No FMCSA record for this MC
brokerCheck.notFoundHint: Could be a typo — or a number that doesn't exist. Verify with the broker before booking.

brokerPick.title: Is this your broker?
brokerPick.footer: Pick the exact match — we never guess, so verification stays accurate.

addLoad.routeError: Couldn't auto-calculate — enter miles manually above.
addLoad.missingInfo: Enter the load pay and miles to continue.
addLoad.saveError: Failed to save load. Please try again.

photo.chooseMessage: Take a photo or choose one from your library
photo.permissionMsg: Allow camera and photo access to attach a BOL photo.

scanBol.hint: Scanned — review the details. We'll calculate the route automatically.
scanBol.failedMsg: We couldn't read that BOL. Try a clearer photo or enter the details manually.
scanBol.notAvailableMsg: BOL scanning isn't available yet. Enter the details manually.

addLoad.statusHintActive: This load will show on your Dashboard with a one-tap Mark Complete button.
addLoad.statusHintUpcoming: Booked but not rolling yet — start it from the Dashboard when you pick it up.

ifta.title: IFTA
ifta.noDataHint: Log loads and fuel entries to auto-build your IFTA report.
ifta.disclaimer: Figures are estimates based on logged data. Verify all totals before filing your IFTA return.
ifta.exportChoose: Choose a format to share with your accountant.
ifta.exportFailedMsg: Could not open the share sheet.
ifta.lockedSub: See all {{count}} states + CSV export, ready for your accountant
ifta.lockedSubSample: Automatic per-state miles + CSV export, ready for your accountant

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.heroEmpty: Enter your expenses and miles below to calculate
expenses.reviewBannerNever: Tap to review — parking, insurance, ELD & more
expenses.reviewBannerDays: Last reviewed {{count}} days ago — tap to confirm
expenses.reviewModalSub: Prices change. Confirm these are still accurate — it keeps your break-even right.
expenses.reviewModalEmpty: No recurring expenses yet. Tap Edit to add them.

tax.title: Tax Set-Aside
tax.explainer: Every completed load’s net pay minus every expense you log feeds this estimate — so you always know what to save for taxes.
tax.disclaimer: Estimate only — not tax advice. Verify with a tax professional.

expenses.monthlyMilesHint: Your average miles per month — used to calculate cost per mile.

history.title: History
history.noLoadsHint: Every load you log will appear here with full profit breakdown.
history.hintSelectedDay: Tap another day on the calendar, or tap the X above to see all loads.
history.hintAllTime: Loads you log will appear here.
history.hintBrowse: Use the arrows above to browse other periods.
history.searchNoResultsHint: Try a city name, state abbreviation, or broker name.
history.deleteExpenseBody: This one-off expense will be removed and your totals updated.

settings.title: Settings
settings.backupNever: Not backed up yet — tap to sync
settings.profileGuestSub: No account — data clears on restart
settings.weeklyMilesSub: Drives your fixed cost per mile
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
This permanently deletes your account and all your data — loads, expenses, fuel history, and BOL photos — from our servers. This cannot be undone.

Note: this does not cancel an active subscription. Manage or cancel it separately via Manage Subscription above (or in your App Store / Google Play account settings) to stop future billing.
settings.deleteAccountFailedBody: Something went wrong and your account was not deleted. Please check your connection and try again.
settings.replayConfirm: This will walk you through the setup flow again to update your break-even calculation.
settings.upgradeSub: Fair-market rates, IFTA, full history & more
settings.notificationsSub: Weekly P&L summary, IFTA reminders, load alerts
settings.shareRateDataSub: Helps all drivers see accurate fair-market rates
settings.rateNetworkBlurbOn: Every completed load you log is shared anonymously — it helps drivers spot lowball offers and sharpens the community rates you see.
settings.rateNetworkBlurbOff: Sharing is off. Turn it on to help build the network and unlock sharper community rates on your lanes.
settings.taxRateSub: Default 25% covers self-employment + income tax for most drivers

rateInsights.aboveUsual: {{amount}} above your usual for this lane
rateInsights.belowUsual: {{amount}} below your usual for this lane

loadDetail.deleteBody: {{route}} will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

paywall.title: Unlock Driver Pro
paywall.titleFairMarket: Know What Every Load Should Pay
paywall.titleIfta: Auto IFTA — Never File By Hand
paywall.subtitleGeneric: Everything you need to run your business like a pro.

reason.fairMarket: You were just quoted a rate. See if it's fair — or if you're being lowballed.
reason.loadLimit: You've logged 15 loads this month. Go unlimited and never hit the wall again.
reason.history: See your full load history, any week, any month — with complete P&L on every run.
reason.ifta: Your per-state mileage is already tracked. Unlock the full report for filing.
reason.export: Export your loads, fuel, and IFTA data any time.
reason.analytics: See exactly where your money goes — and what's eating into your profit.

paywall.roi: One better rate negotiation pays for the whole year.

features.fairMarketSub: Know instantly if you're being lowballed
features.unlimitedLoadsSub: No monthly cap — log every haul
features.historySub: Every past week, month & load detail
features.iftaSub: CSV & PDF, ready for your accountant

paywall.legal: Payment is charged after your 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime in your app store settings.
paywall.restoredBody: Your Driver Pro subscription is active.
paywall.alreadyPro: You're on Driver Pro — thank you!
paywall.fairMarketLock: Upgrade to Pro to see what you should be getting paid
paywall.valueMissed: On {{count}} load{{count, plural, one{} other{s}}} this month, you may have left {{amount}} on the table. Pro drivers see fair market rates before accepting.

analytics.noDataTrend: Add your first load to see trends
analytics.noDataMonth: No completed loads this month yet
analytics.gateSub: See trends and costs over time with Pro

notifications.weeklyPnlBody: See how much you made this week — tap to check your P&L.
notifications.iftaBody: Your quarterly IFTA report is due in 2 weeks. Tap to review and export.
notifications.loadProgressBody: Still on the road? Tap to mark your load complete when you arrive.
notifications.fuelBody: Don't forget to add today's fuel — keeps your CPM and IFTA accurate.
notifications.goalReachedBody: You've hit {{net}} net {{period}} — you hit your {{goal}} goal!
notifications.expenseReviewBody: Insurance, parking, ELD — prices change. Tap to make sure your break-even is still accurate.
notifications.weeklyPnlBodyGeneric: Tap to see your full week breakdown.
notifications.weeklyPnlBodyEmpty: No loads logged yet — add your first to see your real net pay.
notifications.streakBody: You've been profitable for {{weeks}} straight weeks. Keep it up.
notifications.idleBody: It's been a week since your last load. Tap to log it and keep your break-even accurate.

firstLoad.title: That's your first true net 🎉
firstLoad.subtitle: This is what the load really pays — after fuel, fixed costs, and every expense. No more guessing.
firstLoad.accuracy: Log every load and expense to keep your numbers this accurate.

addExpense.title: Add expense
addExpense.attachHint: Attach it to a load to reduce that load's profit, or leave it off to reduce this week & month.
addExpense.saveError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
